script: const esc = (v) => String(v ?? "").replace(/&/g, "&").replace(//g, ">"); ctx.text = "" + esc(ctx.title || "OpenHook") + " Severity: " + esc(ctx.severity || "info") + " Service: " + esc(ctx.service || "-") + " Environment: " + esc(ctx.environment || "-") + " " + esc(ctx.description || ""); return true;
